title: Cloud Storage
aim: To manage objects and buckets using both the Cloud Console and gcloud CLI.

steps.description: Create a new bucket (must be globally unique).
Upload the image to your bucket.
List the contents of your bucket.
Verify public access by opening the Public URL in an incognito window.

viva.question: What is a Bucket?
viva.answer: A basic container that holds your data in Cloud Storage.

viva.question: Is bucket name globally unique?
viva.answer: Yes, it must be unique across the entire Google Cloud ecosystem.

result: Successfully performed bucket creation, file upload, and access control management.
conclusion: Learned how to use Cloud Storage for durable and scalable object storage.
